footer.tagline: Rentals with soul. Long and short stays, hand-picked.

home.featuredCopy: Discover our curated selection of properties in the best Spanish cities. Design, location and service to make your stay memorable.

whyA.title: Culture without filters
whyA.body: Millennia of heritage, lively cities and neighbourhoods with their own identity: from Madrid to Seville, every stop tells a different story.

whyB.title: The Mediterranean at your pace
whyB.body: Costa Brava beaches, local gastronomy and a climate that invites you to linger at any table, any day of the year.

whyC.title: Short distances
whyC.body: High-speed trains and affordable flights connect the main destinations in just a few hours — perfect to combine multiple cities.

whyD.title: Designed stays
whyD.body: Our homes are placed in neighbourhoods where life actually happens, with services designed so you only worry about enjoying.

home.ctaCopy: Discover the comfort and convenience of staying with us for extended periods. Take advantage of our special rates designed exclusively for long stays, offering a continuous experience of quality and comfort.

common.networkError: You appear to be offline. Check your connection and try again.
common.serverError: The server had a problem. Try again in a moment.

checkout.title: Confirm and pay

guest.subtitle: We need a few details to issue the confirmation.

checkout.acceptTerms: I accept the terms and privacy policy.

confirmation.title: Booking confirmed!
confirmation.intro: An email with the details was sent to {{email}}.
confirmation.thanks: Thank you for choosing Wind Homes for your next stay
confirmation.lead: You're all set to start your Wind Homes Experience!
confirmation.bodyA: Your booking is confirmed and we can't wait to welcome you. We'll send you all check-in details before your arrival.
confirmation.bodyB: We've emailed your booking details to {{email}}. If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.

login.title: Sign in
login.intro: Sign in to manage your bookings.
login.inlineIntro: If you already have an account, sign in to book faster.

register.title: Create account
register.intro: We need a few details to issue your bookings.
